Table summary.
Document: Constitution and Bylaws Reference. Purpose: Provide quick access to the 2018 Constitution, Bylaws, and Covenant source and key review questions.. Owner: Church / Clerk TBD. Status: Needs Bylaw Review. Review Needed By: Pastor, Deacons, Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, Nominating Committee. Priority: High. Link: Open.
Document: Decision Log. Purpose: Record decisions, owners, status, and notes.. Owner: Project lead TBD. Status: Draft. Review Needed By: Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, Church Clerk. Priority: High. Link: Open.
Document: Church Organization Chart. Purpose: Show draft governance and financial-operations relationships.. Owner: Pastor / leadership team. Status: Needs Bylaw Review. Review Needed By: Pastor, Deacons, Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, Nominating Committee. Priority: High. Link: Open.
Document: Treasurer Governance Role. Purpose: Draft governance-focused Treasurer / Financial Officer role.. Owner: Finance Committee. Status: Needs Bylaw Review. Review Needed By: Finance Committee, Nominating Committee, Personnel Committee. Priority: High. Link: Open.
Document: Interim Treasurer Role. Purpose: Define temporary Treasurer coverage expectations.. Owner: Finance Committee. Status: Needs Bylaw Review. Review Needed By: Finance Committee, Nominating Committee, Pastor, Deacons. Priority: High. Link: Open.
Document: Finance Committee Charter. Purpose: Clarify Finance Committee purpose, review cadence, reporting, and policy/software ownership.. Owner: Finance Committee. Status: Needs Bylaw Review. Review Needed By: Finance Committee, Pastor, Deacons. Priority: High. Link: Open.

Section: 8. Parking Lot / Later.

Table summary.
Document: Software Implementation Plan. Purpose: Outline software setup and transition after a system is selected.. Owner: Finance Committee. Status: Parking Lot. Review Needed By: Finance Committee. Priority: Medium. Link: Open.
Document: Deacon Update. Purpose: Placeholder for Deacon update or counsel request.. Owner: Pastor / leadership team. Status: Parking Lot. Review Needed By: Deacons, Pastor. Priority: Low. Link: Open.
Document: Audit and Review Policy. Purpose: Draft annual financial review or audit expectations.. Owner: Finance Committee. Status: Needs Finance Review. Review Needed By: Finance Committee, CPA/accounting advisor if used. Priority: Medium. Link: Open.
Document: Payroll Process. Purpose: Draft payroll coordination process.. Owner: Finance Committee. Status: Needs Finance Review. Review Needed By: Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, payroll/accounting advisor. Priority: Medium. Link: Open.

Section: 9. Recent Decisions.

Table summary.
Date: 2026-07-06. Decision: Repository structure created for KBC financial operations modernization.. Owner: Cory Davis. Status: Approved. Link: Decision Log.
Date: 2026-06-28. Decision: Congregation approved adding a paid, part-time Bookkeeper position, not to exceed $150 per week, and gave Personnel Committee authority to hire the right candidate.. Owner: Congregation / Personnel Committee / Nominating Committee / Finance Committee. Status: Approved. Link: Decision Log.

Section: 10. Open Questions.

What duties must remain with the elected Treasurer under KBC bylaws?
What financial controls must Finance Committee define before hiring materials are used?
What employment classification, supervision, evaluation process, and start date should Personnel Committee recommend within the June 28, 2026 authorization?
How should Personnel Committee and Nominating Committee coordinate under the motion?
Which remaining items need Deacon review, church vote, CPA/accounting review, attorney/HR review, or software/vendor review?

See Open Questions for the full list.

Section: Sensitive Information Reminder.

Do not place donor records, payroll details, bank account numbers, passwords, Social Security numbers, confidential personnel issues, private financial data, candidate applications, reference-check notes, or background-check results in this repository or dashboard.

End of chapter: Leader-Friendly Dashboard.
